properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

ProjectListResult.description: The response of a Project list operation.

value.description: The Project items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

organizationName.description: The organization name for the project.

projectId.description: The project ID for the project.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the resource.

values.name: Canceled
values.description: The resource action has been cancelled.

values.name: Accepted
values.description: The resource provisioning has been accepted.

values.name: Disabled
values.description: When disabled the definition queue will not allow builds to be queued by users and the system will not queue scheduled, gated or continuous integration builds. Builds already in the queue will not be started by the system.

values.name: Enabled
values.description: When enabled the definition queue allows builds to be queued by users, the system will queue scheduled, gated and continuous integration builds, and the queued builds will be started by the system.

values.name: Paused
values.description: When paused the definition queue allows builds to be queued by users and the system will queue scheduled, gated and continuous integration builds. Builds in the queue will not be started by the system.
